name: **Timing**: When should my Houston firm start AI visibility audit?

mainEntity.name: **Timing**: When should my Houston firm start AI visibility audit?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Immediately, as AI discovery dominates client searches now.** Delays compound traffic loss.[1] Directories have cycles.[3]

**Key factors:**
- Ongoing shifts
- Annual updates
- Competitive pressure
- Quick wins possible

**Test 10 queries today across platforms.** Act on gaps.[2] **No better time than now.**
